task_completion.description: The diagram contains a left-to-right single elimination bracket structure starting from Quarterfinals.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A draw.io workspace showing multiple boxes arranged in a converging left-to-right hierarchy (typically 4 columns of boxes: 8 for quarterfinals, 4 for semifinals, 2 for finals, 1 for champion).

task_completion.description: All boxes in the bracket are labeled with team names.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text inside the diagram boxes showing esports team names (e.g., T1, G2 Esports, Team Liquid, etc.).

task_completion.description: The boxes are connected by directional arrows showing the progression of winners.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Lines with arrowheads pointing from the earlier rounds on the left to the later rounds on the right, connecting the team boxes.

task_completion.description: The final champion's box is highlighted with a gold or yellow fill color.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The rightmost single box representing the Champion has a yellow or gold background/fill color.

task_completion.description: The diagram is saved as 'winter_major_bracket.drawio' on the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The draw.io window title bar shows 'winter_major_bracket.drawio', or a file manager/desktop view shows this file present on the Desktop.

task_completion.description: The diagram is exported as 'winter_major_bracket.png' to the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager window or desktop view showing the 'winter_major_bracket.png' file, or a save/export dialog confirming the PNG export to the Desktop.

integrity.description: The agent used the draw.io graphical interface to create the diagram.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots showing the draw.io application open with the diagram being actively edited, rather than terminal commands or a text editor modifying XML directly.

integrity.description: The agent opened or read the match_results.txt file to get the correct team names and progression.
integrity.visual_evidence: A text editor, terminal 'cat' command, or similar showing the contents of '~/Desktop/match_results.txt'.

integrity.description: The agent did not use a script to automatically generate the .drawio or .png files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Absence of terminal windows running scripts (e.g., Python, Graphviz, ImageMagick) to bypass the manual creation of the diagram in draw.io.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected draw.io file is 'winter_major_bracket.drawio' and the expected PNG file is 'winter_major_bracket.png'. The actual match results and winners are randomly generated per run and stored in '/tmp/bracket_ground_truth.json'. The teams will be a subset of 12 real esports organizations (e.g., T1, G2 Esports, Team Liquid, Cloud9, Fnatic, FaZe Clan, NAVI, Team Vitality, Gen.G, DRX, 100 Thieves, EDG).
